title: Wrong font in preview when generating a PDF using DocuGen
excerpt: Hi. We´re using “DocuGen” to generate PDFs and are experiencing an issue where the preview displays the wrong font. We´re using the font “Sweden Sans Bold” and “Sweden Sans Book” but when generating a pdf we get “Arial”. …

posts.author: Filurisen (Therese)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. We´re using “DocuGen” to generate PDFs and are experiencing an issue where the preview displays the wrong font. We´re using the font “Sweden Sans Bold” and “Sweden Sans Book” but when generating a pdf we get “Arial”.

I´ve been in contact with DocuGens support and there are indeed a bug on their side reg. the generated document that you download (where a fix is on the way), but according to them the preview issue is something related to Monday. Is this a known issue?

Kind regards,
Therese
